page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: The Form of the Angels
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in late May 2011. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2011/647924.html The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 10 regular figures in the line.
